steps.title: Equilibrate 10 µL of GFP-Trap agarose...
steps.instruction: Equilibrate 10 µL of GFP-Trap agarose beads with water and twice with EBB.

steps.title: Incubate freshly purified ATG9A vesicles (from...
steps.instruction: Incubate freshly purified ATG9A vesicles (from 5x 15-cm plates) or MOCK controls (from wild-type HAP1 cells) with beads at 4 °C for 05:00:00 with gentle rotation.

steps.title: Store Overnight at 4 °C
steps.instruction: Store Overnight at 4 °C .

steps.title: Wash beads twice with 200 µL...
steps.instruction: Wash beads twice with 200 µL SEC150 and resuspend in 5 µL – 10 µL SEC150.

steps.title: Equilibrate 10 µL GFP-Trap beads with...
steps.instruction: Equilibrate 10 µL GFP-Trap beads with water and twice with SEC150.

steps.title: Incubate 500 µL of PLs with beads at 4 °C
steps.instruction: Incubate 500 µL of PLs with beads at 4 °C .

steps.title: After binding, wash beads with SEC150 before downstream applications
steps.instruction: After binding, wash beads with SEC150 before downstream applications.

steps.title: Pipette 20 µL prey protein ( 0
steps.instruction: Pipette 20 µL prey protein ( 0.1 micromolar (µM) mCherry-PI3KC3-C1 or ATG2A-mCherry) into each well.

steps.title: Add 1 µL of bead suspension...
steps.instruction: Add 1 µL of bead suspension (coated with ATG9A vesicles or MOCK control) per well.

steps.title: Incubate 00:30:00 at Room temperature prior to imaging
steps.instruction: Incubate 00:30:00 at Room temperature prior to imaging.

steps.title: Incubate vesicle/PL-coated GFP-Trap beads with 0
steps.instruction: Incubate vesicle/PL-coated GFP-Trap beads with 0.03 micromolar (µM) PI3KC3-C1 for 00:30:00 .

steps.title: Add 0
steps.instruction: Add 0.03 micromolar (µM) mCherry-2xFYVE and incubate 00:10:00 .

steps.title: Add cofactors to initiate PI(3)P production
steps.instruction: Add cofactors to initiate PI(3)P production.

steps.title: Reaction volume
steps.instruction: Reaction volume: 20 µL per well.

steps.title: Incubate 125 µL ATG9A PLs with...
steps.instruction: Incubate 125 µL ATG9A PLs with 10 micromolar (µM) ATG2A and 6.25 µL donor liposomes ( 0.5 mg/mL ) Overnight at 4 °C .

steps.title: Bind to 5 µL GFP-Trap beads for 05:00:00
steps.instruction: Bind to 5 µL GFP-Trap beads for 05:00:00 .

steps.title: Wash once with SEC150, once with...
steps.instruction: Wash once with SEC150, once with SEC250 (25 mM HEPES pH 7.5, 250 mM NaCl, 1 mM DTT), once with SEC350 (25 mM HEPES pH 7.5, 350 mM NaCl, 1 mM DTT) and then twice with SEC150.

steps.title: Resuspend in 3 µL SEC150
steps.instruction: Resuspend in 3 µL SEC150.

steps.title: Add PI3KC3-C1, cofactors, and mCherry-2xFYVE as above (PI3KC3-C1 activity assay)
steps.instruction: Add PI3KC3-C1, cofactors, and mCherry-2xFYVE as above (PI3KC3-C1 activity assay).

steps.title: Use 0
steps.instruction: Use 0.5 µL GFP-Trap beads coated with ATG9A vesicles per 20 µL reaction.

steps.title: Add 250 nanomolar (nM) each of
steps.instruction: Add 250 nanomolar (nM) each of: mCherry-GABARAPΔL117 (lipidatable), ATG7 (E1), ATG3 (E2), ATG5-ATG12-ATG16L1 (E3).

steps.title: Add 2 millimolar (mM) ATP and 1 millimolar (mM) MgCl₂
steps.instruction: Add 2 millimolar (mM) ATP and 1 millimolar (mM) MgCl₂.

steps.title: Incubate for 02:30:00 at 30 °C
steps.instruction: Incubate for 02:30:00 at 30 °C .

steps.title: Wash beads once with SEC150
steps.instruction: Wash beads once with SEC150.

steps.title: Controls
steps.instruction: Controls: non-lipidatable GABARAP-FL, mCherry alone, or omission of E1/E2/E3.

steps.title: Equilibrate 5 µL Glutathione Sepharose beads with water and SEC150
steps.instruction: Equilibrate 5 µL Glutathione Sepharose beads with water and SEC150.

steps.title: Incubate with 5 micromolar (µM) GST-tagged...
steps.instruction: Incubate with 5 micromolar (µM) GST-tagged bait in SEC150 for 01:00:00 at 4 °C .

steps.title: Wash beads 3x with SEC150
steps.instruction: Wash beads 3x with SEC150.

steps.title: Resuspend in 5 µL SEC150
steps.instruction: Resuspend in 5 µL SEC150.

steps.title: Dispense 20 µL of 0
steps.instruction: Dispense 20 µL of 0.5 micromolar (µM) ATG2A-mCherry or ATG2A-LIR-mCherry into wells.

steps.title: Add 1 µL beads per well
steps.instruction: Add 1 µL beads per well.

steps.title: Imaging
steps.instruction: Imaging: All samples were imaged using a Zeiss LSM 700 confocal microscopeequipped with a Plan Apochromat 20×/0.8 WD 0.55 mm objective.
